name: cs-net
description: CS-NET is a Transformer-based deep learning framework for analyzing Counter-Strike 2 match replays (.dem demo files). It parses match recordings, converts game states into token sequences, and uses pre-trained Transformer models for multiple real-time predictions.

name: naotab
description: A Chrome extension that turns your browser tabs into a personal knowledge base — save tabs with context, auto-tag with AI, and visualize connections as a network graph.

name: sample-automated-reasoning-formalization
description: ARchitect helps non-technical users create Automated Reasoning policies from their document
